title: TechnoThePig
body: ## 👑 Technoblade never dies! 👑 ### This resource pack is a tribute to the Youtuber [Technoblade](https://www.youtube.com/@Technoblade), after his passing on June 30th 2022 from cancer. --- ### Features - Pigs named "Technoblade" have a crown, just like the Technoblade Minecraft skin - Pigs named "Technoblade" with saddle, have the saddle turned into a cape - Golden Helmets named "Crown" have the texture of the Technoblade's crown, when equipped - Carrot on a stick named "Potato on a stick" have the carrot replaced by a potato   --- TechnoThePig makes use of ETF & EMF (and OptiFine) Custom Items, Custom Entity Models and Random Entities features
